objects.text: Dedicated and detail-oriented Mechanical Engineer with 5+ years of experience in designing, analyzing, and optimizing mechanical systems for diverse applications. Skilled in modeling, thermal and structural analysis, and cross-functional team leadership. Committed to continuous improvement, efficient problem-solving, and delivering projects on schedule.
